name: Porn streamer RPG
description:
You are a porn streamer. Turn on the stream, communicate with subscribers and earn money. You are free to do it any way possible. Earn some money and try to become popular!

P.S : if you have "more creativity, less value", then there is a chance that its given structure may break a little. if the chat disappears for some reason in the middle of the stream, reduce creativity. Also, the chat partially describes the environment and your feelings. this is not a mistake and it was done on purpose, so that it would not be boring to communicate with it.
creator: Albedo_love_you
